title: Vulnerability Lifecycle (9-state)
description: Audit C11 hardening. The AppSec finding schema (§9) already had owner/sla_due/status/verification_status/risk_acceptance + a deterministic SLA-BLOCK; this adds the explicit 9-state machine, legal-transition enforcement (no illegal jumps), and the commit/PR/expiry fields so an exception cannot quietly outlive its review date. Enforced by schemas/lifecycle-transition-verify.js + appsec-sdk lifecycle.transition / exception.sweep.

affected_commit.description: commit where the vuln was introduced/observed

exception_expiry.description: ISO date/datetime an ACCEPTED_RISK exception expires; past expiry → EXPIRED_EXCEPTION (auto-reopen)

x-rules.no_illegal_jump: e.g. OPEN->FIXED (skips triage/fixing) and OPEN->CLOSED (close without resolution) are rejected
x-rules.auto_reopen: ACCEPTED_RISK whose exception_expiry < now MUST move to EXPIRED_EXCEPTION (appsec-sdk exception.sweep finds these and exits non-zero)
